text: Tenders must be received no later than 12:00 noon on 30 Sept 2025; late tenders will be rejected.
The tenderer must hold Employer's Liability insurance of at least Ł5,000,000. This is assessed on a Pass/Fail basis; a Fail eliminates the bid.
The tenderer must hold Public Liability insurance of at least Ł10,000,000 (Pass/Fail).
The Form of Tender must be completed signed and returned; failure will disqualify the tender.
Two client references should be provided for scoring.
All pricing rows must be completed and returned; omitting a price or altering the schedule will reject the tender.
The priced schedule must be submitted by the deadline; late or incomplete schedules will be excluded.
A signed anti-collusion certificate is required; failure results in exclusion.
Social-value initiatives may be provided for scoring.
